summary: The implementation comprehensively fulfills all specified requirements. The backend implements a complete product management and shopping cart system in Motoko with all CRUD operations. The frontend provides a modern e-commerce experience with product catalog, detail pages, cart management, and checkout flow. The warm earth tone color scheme (terracotta, sage green, cream) is implemented throughout using OKLCH color system. All required images are referenced in the appropriate paths. No missing requirements or hallucinated features were identified.
